H900.derivation: feminine plural active participle of H898 (בָּגַד);

H904.derivation: or בִּגְתָנָא; of similar derivation to H903 (בִּגְתָא);
H904.strongs_def: Bigthan or Bigthana, a eunuch of Xerxes

H905.strongs_def: properly, separation; by implication, a part of the body, branch of atree, bar forcarrying; figuratively, chief of a city; especially (with prepositional prefix) as an adverb, apart, only, besides
H905.kjv_def: alone, apart, bar, besides, branch, by self, of each alike, except, only, part, staff, strength.
H905.usage: stave(37x), beside(3x), branches(3x), alone(2x), only(2x), strength(2x), apart(1x), bars(1x), each(1x), except(1x), like(1x), themselves(1x)

H906.derivation: perhaps from H909 (בָּדַד) (in the sense of divided fibres);
H906.strongs_def: flaxen thread or yarn; hence, a linen garment

H907.strongs_def: a brag or lie; also a liar

H912.derivation: probably a shortened form H5662 (עֹבַדְיָה); servant of Jehovah;

H913.strongs_def: alloy (because removed by smelting); by analogy, tin

H914.strongs_def: to divide (in variation senses literally or figuratively, separate, distinguish, differ, select, etc.)
H914.kjv_def: (make, put) difference, divide (asunder), (make) separate (self, -ation), sever (out), [idiom] utterly.
H914.usage: separate(25x), divide(8x), difference(4x), asunder(2x), severed(2x), separation(1x)

H916.strongs_def: something in pieces, i.e. bdellium, a (fragrant) gum (perhaps amber); others a pearl

H917.strongs_def: Bedan, the name of two Israelites

H918.derivation: a primitive root; to gap open; used only as a denominative from H919 (בֶּדֶק);

H919.strongs_def: a gap or leak (in a building or a ship)

H920.derivation: probably from H1856 (דָּקַר) with a prepositional prefix; by stabbing, i.e. assassin;

H922.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to be empty);
H922.strongs_def: a vacuity, i.e. (superficially) an undistinguishable ruin

H923.derivation: from an unused root (probably meaning to glisten);

H925.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to be bright);

H926.strongs_def: to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously
H926.kjv_def: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.
H926.usage: trouble(17x), haste(4x), afraid(3x), vexed(3x), amazed(2x), hasty(2x), affrighted(1x), dismayed(1x), hastily(1x), rash(1x), speedily(1x), speedy(1x), vex(1x)

H929.derivation: from an unused root (probably meaning to be mute);
H929.strongs_def: properly, a dumb beast; especially any large quadruped or animal (often collective)

H930.derivation: in form a plural or H929 (בְּהֵמָה), but really a singular of Egyptian derivation;
H930.strongs_def: a water-ox, i.e. the hippopotamus or Nile-horse

H931.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to be thick;
H931.strongs_def: the thumb of the hand or great toe of the foot

H933.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be pale;

H934.derivation: feminine active participle of the same as H925 (בָּהִיר);
H934.strongs_def: a whitish spot on the skin

H935.strongs_def: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
H935.kjv_def: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upon, to pass), depart, [idiom] doubtless again, [phrase] eat, [phrase] employ, (cause to) enter (in, into, -tering, -trance, -try), be fallen, fetch, [phrase] follow, get, give, go (down, in, to war), grant, [phrase] have, [idiom] indeed, (in-) vade, lead, lift (up), mention, pull in, put, resort, run (down), send, set, [idiom] (well) stricken (in age), [idiom] surely, take (in), way.

H938.strongs_def: Buz, the name of a son of Nahor, and of an Israelite

H939.strongs_def: something scorned; an object of contempt

H940.strongs_def: a Buzite or descendant of Buz

H945.derivation: the same as H944 (בּוּל) (in the sense of rain);

H948.derivation: from an unused root (of the same form) meaning to bleach, i.e. (intransitive) be white;

H949.derivation: from the same as H948 (בּוּץ); shining;

H950.derivation: feminine passive participle of an unused root (meaning to be hollow);

H951.derivation: properly, active participle from H1239 (בָּקַר) as denominative from H1241 (בָּקָר);

H953.derivation: from H952 (בּוּר) (in the sense of H877 (בֹּאר));
H953.strongs_def: a pit hole (especially one used as a cistern or a prison)

H954.strongs_def: properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed
H954.kjv_def: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.
H954.usage: ashamed(72x), confounded(21x), shame(9x), confusion(1x), delayed(1x), dry(1x), long(1x), shamed(1x)

H959.kjv_def: despise, disdain, contemn(-ptible), [phrase] think to scorn, vile person.

H962.kjv_def: catch, gather, (take) for a prey, rob(-ber), spoil, take (away, spoil), [idiom] utterly.
H962.usage: spoil(9x), prey(9x), spoiled(6x), rob(6x), take(6x), caught(1x), gathering(1x), robbers(1x), took(1x), utterly(1x)

H964.derivation: from H959 (בָּזָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); contempts of Jah;

H965.derivation: from an unused root meaning to lighten;

H970.derivation: or בָּחֻר; participle passive of H977 (בָּחַר);
H970.strongs_def: properly, selected, i.e. a youth (often collective)

H973.kjv_def: abhor, get hastily (from the margin for H926 (בָּהַל)).

H974.strongs_def: to test (especially metals); generally and figuratively, to investigate

H975.derivation: from H974 (בָּחַן) (in the sense of keeping a look-out);

H977.strongs_def: properly, to try, i.e. (by implication) select
H977.kjv_def: acceptable, appoint, choose (choice), excellent, join, be rather, require.
H977.usage: choose(77x), chosen(77x), choice(6x), acceptable(1x), appoint(1x), excellent(1x), rather(1x), require(1x)

H978.strongs_def: a Bacharumite or inhabitant of Bachurim

H979.derivation: or בְּחוּרוֹת; feminine plural of H970 (בָּחוּר); also (masculine plural) בְּחֻרִים;

H980.derivation: or בַּחוּרִים; masculine plural of H970 (בָּחוּר); young men;

H981.strongs_def: to babble; hence, to vociferate angrily

H982.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as H2620 (חָסָה));
H982.strongs_def: figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure
H982.kjv_def: be bold (confident, secure, sure), careless (one, woman), put confidence, (make to) hope, (put, make to) trust.
H982.usage: trust(103x), confidence(4x), secure(4x), confident(2x), bold(1x), careless(1x), hope(1x), hoped(1x), ones(1x), sure(1x), women(1x)

H983.strongs_def: properly, a place of refuge; abstract, safety, both the fact (security) and the feeling (trust); often (adverb with or without preposition) safely
H983.kjv_def: assurance, boldly, (without) care(-less), confidence, hope, safe(-ly, -ty), secure, surely.
H983.usage: safely(17x), safety(9x), carelessly(3x), careless(2x), safe(2x), securely(2x), assurance(1x), boldly(1x), care(1x), confidence(1x), hope(1x), secure(1x), surely(1x)

H990.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to be hollow;
H990.strongs_def: the belly, especially the womb; also the bosom or body of anything
H990.kjv_def: belly, body, [phrase] as they be born, [phrase] within, womb.

H992.strongs_def: (only in plural) a pistachio-nut (from its form)

H994.derivation: perhaps from H1158 (בָּעָה) (in the sense of asking); properly, a request; used only adverbially (always with 'my Lord');
H994.strongs_def: oh that!; with leave, or if it please

H995.strongs_def: to separate mentally (or distinguish), i.e.(generally) understand
H995.kjv_def: attend, consider, be cunning, diligently, direct, discern, eloquent, feel, inform, instruct, have intelligence, know, look well to, mark, perceive, be prudent, regard, (can) skill(-full), teach, think, (cause, make to, get, give, have) understand(-ing), view, (deal) wise(-ly, man).
H995.usage: understand(62x), understanding(32x), consider(22x), prudent(8x), perceive(7x), regard(6x), discern(3x), instruct(3x)

H996.derivation: (sometimes in the plural masculine or feminine); properly, the constructive form of an otherwise unused noun from H995 (בִּין); a distinction; but used only as a preposition,
H996.strongs_def: between (repeated before each noun, often with other particles); also as a conjunction, either...or
H996.kjv_def: among, asunder, at, between (-twixt...and), [phrase] from (the widest), [idiom] in, out of, whether (it be...or), within.
H996.pos: masculine substantive (always used as a preposition)

H997.strongs_def: {between (repeated before each noun, often with other particles); also as a conjunction, either...or}

H998.usage: understanding(32x), wisdom(2x), knowledge(1x), meaning(1x), perfectly(1x), understand(1x)
